summary: Animated candles e-commerce full-stack web/mobile app with product photo uploads, cart, UPI payment, AI chatbot, live chat, wishlist, loyalty program, customer care, login/register (email, phone, Google), responsive design (mobile/tablet/desktop), color theme: blue, white, pink, violet.
architectural_notes: Full-stack app: responsive across mobile, tablet, desktop
Color theme: blue, white, pink, violet
Authentication: email/password, phone number OTP, Google OAuth
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Hero banner with glowing candles arrangement on a dark romantic background with soft blue, pink and violet bokeh light effects (hero-banner.dim_1440x600.png)
- Animated-style candle flame illustration with violet and pink glow for use as a decorative UI element (candle-flame-icon.dim_256x256.png)
- App logo — stylized candle with a glowing flame using pink and violet colors on a white background (luminary-logo.dim_400x400.png)
- Background texture — dark deep blue with subtle violet gradient and faint sparkle particles for auth pages (auth-bg.dim_1440x900.png)

existing_features.title: Design and apply a cohesive visual theme using blue, white, pink, and violet as the primary palette. The UI should feel elegant and romantic, with soft gradients, glowing candle-inspired accents, and smooth micro-animations throughout. Typography should be refined and readable. Layout must be fully responsive across mobile phones, tablets, laptops, and desktop screens.

Build a Login page supporting sign-in via email+password and Google OAuth. Build a separate Registration page supporting sign-up via email address, phone number, and Google OAuth. Both pages must follow the blue/white/pink/violet theme with animated candle background elements.

Build a Product Listing / Home page that displays all available candle products as cards with photo, name, price, and an Add-to-Cart button. Include animated candle flame effects on product cards (CSS/Lottie-style flicker animation). Each card links to a Product Detail page showing full description, photos, price, stock status, user reviews & ratings, and Add-to-Cart / Add-to-Wishlist actions.

Implement a Shopping Cart and Checkout flow. Users can view cart items, adjust quantities, remove items, and proceed to checkout. The checkout page collects shipping address and displays order summary. Integrate a simulated Stripe payment flow (since UPI direct API integration is not available in this platform, use Stripe as the payment gateway which supports INR).
Implement a Wishlist / Favorites feature. Logged-in users can add candle products to their wishlist, view their wishlist page, and move items from wishlist to cart.

Implement a Loyalty / Rewards Program. Users earn points on each completed purchase (e.g., 1 point per ₹10 spent). A Rewards page shows the user's current point balance, points history, and available rewards/discounts they can redeem.

Add an AI Chatbot widget that appears as a floating button on all pages. When opened, it shows a chat panel where users can type questions and receive automated helpful responses about candles, orders, and the store. The chatbot should simulate AI responses (rule-based or scripted) since external AI API integrations are not supported.

Add a Customer Care / Support page accessible from the navigation. It should include a contact form (name, email, subject, message), a FAQ section with common candle business questions, and business contact details. Also include a Live Chat placeholder section with support availability hours.

new_feature_requests.summary: Candle product listing with photo upload and details
User login and registration (email, phone number, Google OAuth)
AI chatbot widget for customer support
Animated candle effects and UI animations (blue/white/pink/violet theme)

Implement a Candle Product Catalog backend that stores product records including: name, description, price (INR), stock quantity, category, and one or more photo URLs. Expose backend methods to create, read, update, and delete products (admin), and to list/filter products (public).

Create a User Reviews & Ratings backend. Logged-in users who have purchased a product can submit a star rating (1–5) and a text review. Expose methods to submit a review and fetch reviews by product ID.
